name: Sith Saber
author: BattleBob72
description: ***NEW DOUBLE BLADED LIGHTSABER*** - 7 colored single blades to choose from in options - Throwable and Controllable where it orbits/destroys by pressing RMB - Early Return after throw by pressing LMB - Press "Z" to put away lightsaber ***FORCE LIGHTNING*** - Press "E" to shoot powerfull lightning blasts out of your left hand ***FORCE LEVITATION*** - Press "Q" to force lift everything in front of you - Walk forward or backward while pressing Q to push/pull objects - ***FORCE CRUSH*** - Press "C" to pull everything in front of you and crush it into nothing - ***FORCE JUMP*** - Press and hold "SpaceBar" to force jump/levitate yourself.  Big thanks to ***Dzage*** for helping with improved force effects and providing a more "Teardown" like Sith hand model.  NEW UPDATE *** Even *** better force lightning and the ability to snuff out all fires when Pressing "Z" to put away lightsaber, thanks to Dzage.  New double bladed lightsaber thanks to Dzage and Micro. ***
